description_wiki: Clark Fork Valley Hospital is a full-service community hospital in Plains, Montana, USA.  The hospital features a 24/7 emergency department, Intensive Care Unit, Family Birthing Center, and a complete imaging department anchored by a multi-slice GE lightspeed CT scanner, 3-dimensional ultrasound, echocardiography and all digital imaging.
